recommendations.title: Black Lightning
recommendations.overview: A Moscow University student discovers that his otherwise unremarkable car can fly. After his father is attacked, he decides to use the car to fight crime and becomes the city's defender against an evil millionaire.

recommendations.title: Six Degrees of Celebration
recommendations.overview: A collection of several interlinked stories that happen on the New Year's eve...
recommendations.director: Alexander Andryuschenko, Yaroslav Chevazhevsky, Alexander Voitinsky, Timur Bekmambetov, Ignas Jonynas, Dmitry Kiselev

recommendations.title: The Spacewalker
recommendations.overview: March 1965. In the heat of the Cold War, the USA and the USSR are competing for supremacy in space. What both superpowers aim for in this race, is to be the first to have a man walk in outer space. To accomplish that, no price is too high and no risk

recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: Zenon: The Zequel
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar is 15 and lives on a space station which the military has taken over and is dismantling. She receives a mysterious signal and must convince everyone that it's from aliens who have come to help them.

recommendations.title: Zenon: Girl of the 21st Century
recommendations.genres: Family, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar, a 13-year-old girl who lives on a space station in the year 2049, gets into some trouble and is banished to Earth. With help from some Earth friends she must find her way back.

recommendations.title: Arco
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: 10-year-old Arco lives in a far future. During his first flight in his rainbow suit, he loses control and falls into the past. Iris, a girl his age from 2075, comes to his rescue and tries by all means to help send him back to his era.

recommendations.title: The Tomorrow War
recommendations.overview: The world is stunned when a group of time travelers arrive from the year 2051 to deliver an urgent message: Thirty years in the future, mankind is losing a global war against a deadly alien species. The only hope for survival is for soldiers and civi

recommendations.title: Solaris
recommendations.overview: A psychologist is sent to a space station orbiting a planet called Solaris to investigate the death of a doctor and the mental problems of cosmonauts on the station. He soon discovers that the water on the planet is a type of brain which brings out r

recommendations.title: Paddington
recommendations.overview: A young Peruvian bear travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.
